title: Financial Instrument Valuation
description:
The result of a valuation of some aspect of a Financial Instrument

Valuation includes determining the Fair Value of equity instruments, debt instruments, derivatives (option and future contracts) and embedded derivatives (convertible bonds / preference shares). Financial Instruments may require valuation for commercial, financial reporting, Tax or regulatory purposes.
https://www.transiqueadvisors.com/services/valuation-advisory/valuation-of-financial-securities-instruments-derivatives/
